attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL.PO_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL.SEGMENT1, STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL.CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL.AGENT_ID, STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL.VENDOR_ID, STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL.VENDOR_ORDER_NUM, STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL.CANCEL_FLAG, STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL.NOTE_TO_RECEIVER, STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL.NOTE_TO_VENDOR, STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL.ORG_ID, STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL.OTM_STATUS_CODE, STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL.VENDOR_SITE_ID, STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL.COMMENTS, STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL.STATUS_LOOKUP_CODE, STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL.AUTHORIZATION_STATUS, STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL,
 (
 select PO_HEADER_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL
 minus
 select PO_HEADER_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.PO_HEADER_ID = STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL.PO_HEADER_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_PO_HEADERS_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME
